question: Among Harris, Hidalgo, Dallas, and Cameron counties in Texas, which two saw the largest percentage decrease in day care home meal reimbursements from 2018-19 to 2020-21? Of those two, which had the higher average child center enrollment across 2018-19 and 2019-20? For that county, what is the county seat? During which war did the namesake of the county seat die in? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/child-and-adult-care-food-programs-cacfp-day-care-homes-meal-reimbursement-program-ye-2018/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

result = (
    df.loc[
        (df["ProgramYear"] == "2018-2019")
        & (df["SiteCounty"].isin(["HARRIS", "HIDALGO", "DALLAS", "CAMERON"])),
        ["SiteCounty", "TotalMealReimbursement"],
    ]
    .groupby("SiteCounty", as_index=False)["TotalMealReimbursement"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values("TotalMealReimbursement", ascending=False)
)

answer = dict(zip(result["SiteCounty"], result["TotalMealReimbursement"]))
1.subquestion: What were the total day care home meal reimbursements in 2018-2019 for Harris, Hidalgo, Dallas, and Cameron counties?

import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/child-and-adult-care-food-program-cacfp-child-centers-meal-reimbursement-program-year-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

result = (
    df.loc[
        (df["ProgramYear"] == "2019-2020")
        & (df["SiteCounty"].isin(["HIDALGO", "CAMERON"])),
        ["SiteCounty", "EnrollmentQty"],
    ]
    .groupby("SiteCounty", as_index=False)["EnrollmentQty"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values("EnrollmentQty", ascending=False)
)

answer = dict(zip(result["SiteCounty"], result["EnrollmentQty"]))

6.fact: The city was founded in 1848 by American entrepreneur Charles Stillman after he developed a successful river-boat company nearby. It was named for Fort Brown, itself named after Major Jacob Brown, who fought and died while serving as a U.S. Army soldier during the Mexican–American War (1846–1848).
